requirement_topic.en: Timor-Leste Grid Connection — 220/380 V 50 Hz Project Acceptance
requirement_topic.zh: 东帝汶并网接入——220/380 V 50 Hz项目验收
requirement_topic.zht: 東帝汶併網接入——220/380 V 50 Hz項目驗收

summary.en: Timor-Leste's power system is coordinated by ANE and operated through national supply structures such as EDTL, and uses a 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase, 50 Hz grid. Any EV charger installation connected to public or facility supply should be treated as a project-acceptance matter with ANE/EDTL or the site utility authority, including supply-capacity review, protection settings, metering, earthing, harmonic data, commissioning documentation, and installer qualification. The voltage and frequency nominally match China's domestic baseline, but site-specific grid strength, protection coordination, and Timor-Leste climate conditions should still be validated.
summary.zh: 东帝汶电力系统由ANE协调并通过EDTL等国家供电体系运行，电网为220 V单相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz。任何接入公共或设施供电的电动汽车充电桩安装均应作为ANE/EDTL或场地供电主管方的项目验收事项处理，包括供电容量审查、保护设定、计量、接地、谐波数据、调试文件和安装方资质。电压和频率名义上与中国国内基线一致，但仍须验证具体场地的电网强度、保护配合和东帝汶气候条件。
summary.zht: 東帝汶電力系統由ANE協調並通過EDTL等國家供電體系運行，電網為220 V單相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz。任何接入公共或設施供電的電動汽車充電樁安裝均應作為ANE/EDTL或場地供電主管方的項目驗收事項處理，包括供電容量審查、保護設定、計量、接地、諧波數據、調試文件和安裝方資質。電壓和頻率名義上與中國國內基線一致，但仍須驗證具體場地的電網強度、保護配合和東帝汶氣候條件。

standards_or_laws: ANE/EDTL project connection and commissioning requirements
Timor-Leste 220/380 V 50 Hz electricity supply context
IEC 61851-1 — EV conductive charging system general requirements
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power quality

summary.en: China domestic charger installations are documented against GB/T 18487.1-2023, GB/T 20234 connector standards, GB/T 27930-2023 for DC communication, and local grid-operator project acceptance. China's grid is also 220/380 V 50 Hz, so nominal voltage and frequency are not the main gap. The gap is that China grid acceptance, protection settings, and GB/T test reports are not ANE/EDTL approval and do not prove site-specific performance under Timor-Leste operating conditions.
summary.zh: 中国国内充电桩安装通常依据GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口标准、直流通信GB/T 27930-2023以及当地电网运营商项目验收文件。中国电网同为220/380 V 50 Hz，因此名义电压和频率并非主要差距。差距在于：中国并网验收、保护设定和GB/T测试报告不是ANE/EDTL批准，也不能证明在东帝汶运行条件下的场地特定性能。
summary.zht: 中國國內充電樁安裝通常依據GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口標準、直流通訊GB/T 27930-2023以及當地電網運營商項目驗收文件。中國電網同為220/380 V 50 Hz，因此名義電壓和頻率並非主要差距。差距在於：中國併網驗收、保護設定和GB/T測試報告不是ANE/EDTL批准，也不能證明在東帝汶運行條件下的場地特定性能。

standards_or_laws: China local grid operator project-acceptance requirements

gap.en: Exporters must confirm input range, protective-device ratings, earthing system, metering, harmonic current, surge protection, and commissioning documents for the actual Timor-Leste site. A China-ready 220/380 V charger can still fail ANE/EDTL project acceptance if protection settings, harmonics, load calculations, or installation documentation are not prepared for local projects. Timor-Leste climate effects should be included even where voltage and frequency match China.
gap.zh: 出口商须针对东帝汶具体场地确认输入范围、保护器件额定值、接地系统、计量、谐波电流、浪涌保护和调试文件。即使充电桩已适配中国220/380 V电网，如保护设定、谐波、负荷计算或安装文件未按当地项目准备，仍可能无法通过ANE/EDTL项目验收。即便电压和频率与中国一致，也应纳入东帝汶气候影响。
gap.zht: 出口商應針對東帝汶具體場地確認輸入範圍、保護器件額定值、接地系統、計量、諧波電流、浪湧保護和調試文件。即使充電樁已適配中國220/380 V電網，如保護設定、諧波、負荷計算或安裝文件未按當地項目準備，仍可能無法通過ANE/EDTL項目驗收。即便電壓和頻率與中國一致，也應納入東帝汶氣候影響。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for grid-connected installations — ANE/EDTL or the relevant site utility authority must accept the project connection, commissioning evidence, and installation documentation
mandatory_status.cn: China local grid operator acceptance applies domestically and is not an ANE/EDTL approval substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Timor-Leste's 220/380 V 50 Hz grid reduces frequency and voltage conversion risk, but it does not remove ANE/EDTL project acceptance. Prepare site-specific grid, protection, harmonic, metering, commissioning, and climate impact evidence before installation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 东帝汶220/380 V 50 Hz电网降低了频率和电压转换风险，但不免除ANE/EDTL项目验收。安装前应准备场地特定的电网、保护、谐波、计量、调试和气候影响证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 東帝汶220/380 V 50 Hz 電網降低了頻率和電壓轉換風險，但不免除ANE/EDTL項目驗收。安裝前應準備場地特定的電網、保護、諧波、計量、調試和氣候影響證據。
